items.name: headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

descriptions.zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。
descriptions.en: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

items.name: markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

descriptions.zh: 用于将文件和 Office 文档转换为 Markdown 的 Python 工具。
descriptions.en: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

items.name: ECC
items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

descriptions.zh: 代理利用性能优化系统。 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等的技能、直觉、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发。
descriptions.en: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

items.name: Scrapling
items.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

descriptions.zh: 🕷️ 一个自适应网页抓取框架，可以处理从单个请求到全面抓取的所有内容！
descriptions.en: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

items.name: hermes-webui
items.description: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!

descriptions.zh: Hermes WebUI：从网络或手机使用 Hermes Agent 的最佳方式！
descriptions.en: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!

items.name: flowsint
items.description: A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.

descriptions.zh: 一个用于可视化、灵活且可扩展的基于图形的调查的现代平台。适用于网络安全分析师和调查人员。
descriptions.en: A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.
